text:
報告、承りました。
任務の内容についても
十分に把握されたようですね。

模擬訓練を終えた者には
フォトンクリスタルが与えられます。
貴方のさらなる活躍を期待します。

……さて、以降は私の言葉です。
模擬訓練は終えましたが、この任務が
過酷さを見せるのはここからです。

判断をなさるのは貴方自身です。
ですが、くれぐれも
無理だけはし

I've filed a report on your work--it seems
you've fully grasped the substance of these
missions.

Those who have completed the mock training
course are awarded a Photon Crystal. I'm
looking forward to seeing what you can do.

That concludes my commentary on the
matter. You may have completed the
mock training course, but these missions
will only grow more rigorous.

It's completely up to you to judge your own
capabilities. However, don't overexert yourself.
